query: SELECT id, JSON_EXTRACT(itemData, '$.category') as category, JSON_EXTRACT(itemData, '$.sku') as sku, JSON_EXTRACT(itemData, '$.photoUrl') as photoUrl FROM quote_items WHERE JSON_EXTRACT(itemData, '$.category') = 'LED BAR' LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4QE1i3LPsxu4CUm.root --database emCAipNpTbMAUBXoZXdNuB --execute SELECT id, JSON_EXTRACT(itemData, '$.category') as category, JSON_EXTRACT(itemData, '$.sku') as sku, JSON_EXTRACT(itemData, '$.photoUrl') as photoUrl FROM quote_items WHERE JSON_EXTRACT(itemData, '$.category') = 'LED BAR' LIMIT 5;
